visuals.title: N-gram Context Windows
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Statistical Language Modeling</text>
  
  <!-- Input Text -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Input Text
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Processing Model -->
  <rect x="200" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Model
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Output Prediction -->
  <rect x="350" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="410" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Prediction
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Input to Model -->
  <path d="M170 80 L200 80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="200 80,195 75,195 85" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Model to Prediction -->
  <path d="M320 80 L350 80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="350 80,345 75,345 85" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  
  <!-- N-grams -->
  <rect x="50" y="150" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    N-grams
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Probability Distribution -->
  <rect x="200" y="150" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Probability
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Next Word Prediction -->
  <rect x="350" y="150" width="120" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="410" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Next Word
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from N-grams to Probability -->
  <path d="M170 170 L200 170" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="200 170,195 165,195 175" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Probability to Next Word -->
  <path d="M320 170 L350 170" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="350 170,345 165,345 175" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  
  <!-- Training Data -->
  <rect x="50" y="240" width="120" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Training Data
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Learning Process -->
  <rect x="200" y="240" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Learning
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Model Parameters -->
  <rect x="350" y="240" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="410" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Parameters
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Training to Learning -->
  <path d="M170 260 L200 260" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="200 260,195 255,195 265" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Learning to Parameters -->
  <path d="M320 260 L350 260" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="350 260,345 255,345 265" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
</svg>
